diaryVideo.caption: Every second with you is my favorite memory.

memoryBook.caption: I keep coming back to this one.

poems.title: For You, Always
poems.content:
In the quiet of the night,
when the world has gone to sleep,
I find myself thinking of you
and all the promises we keep.

You are my favorite hello
and my hardest goodbye.

poems.title: A Letter
poems.content: I don't know how to say this without sounding dramatic, but you changed my life. Not in a big-bang kind of way, but in the quiet way mornings feel better because you exist in the same world as me. I'm grateful. Always.

poems.title: Quick Note
poems.content: You're annoying. But like, the kind of annoying I want to deal with for the rest of my life. So there's that.

envelopes.label: When you miss me
envelopes.message: Close your eyes. I'm right there. I always am. Think of our best memory together and smile. I'll be doing the same.

envelopes.label: When you are sad
envelopes.message: Hey. Whatever it is, it's going to pass. And I'll be here when it does. You're stronger than you know, and you're never alone.

envelopes.label: When you can't sleep
envelopes.message: Count the reasons I love you instead of sheep. Actually, you'd never fall asleep then. Just know I'm probably thinking of you too.

envelopes.label: When you need a laugh
envelopes.message: Remember that time you tried to cook for me? Yeah. That's it. That's the joke. I love you anyway.

envelopes.label: When you feel alone
envelopes.message: You're not. You never are. I carry you with me everywhere I go. And I mean that in the least creepy way possible.

traits: The way you pretend you're not clingy.
How you act tough but melt.
The way you laugh at your own jokes.
How you steal all the blankets.
The way you say "I'm fine" when you're clearly not.
Your dramatic goodbyes that last 20 minutes.
How you get jealous of fictional characters.
The way you look at me when you think I'm not watching.
endingSubtext: More than words could ever say.
